        other

        warn
      • warn(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)

Logit is a simple and efficient logging library for Nim, designed to provide a flexible and easy-to-use logging solution for applications of all sizes. It supports logging to both files and the console, with customizable log levels, namespaces, and formatting options.

This is a modified version of the original Logit library, from Miqueas Martínez Nelson "darltrash" López.

This modified version makes use of a read-write lock to ensure thread safety when multiple threads are logging simultaneously.

License zlib | (c) 2026 Miqueas Martínez & Nelson López.

Modified by George Lemon for Supranim Framework | https://supranim.com

Types

InstantiationInfo = tuple[filename: string, line: int, column: int]
Logit = object
  filePrefix*: TimeFormat
  namespace*: string
  exitOnError*: bool
  logToFile*: bool
  logToConsole*: bool
  defaultLogLevel*: LogLevel
LogLevel = enum
  OTHER, TRACE, INFO, DEBUG, WARN, ERROR, FATAL

Procs

proc `$`(lvl: LogLevel): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc finish(self: var Logit) {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc header(self: Logit; message: string) {....raises: [IOError, ValueError],
    tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc initLogit(logsFolder = getTempDir(); namespace = "Logit";
               defaultLogLevel = OTHER; logToFile = true; logToConsole = false;
               exitOnError = false; filePrefix = initTimeFormat("YYYY-MM-dd")): Logit {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
Initializes a Logit instance with the specified configuration. 
proc logsFolder(self: Logit): string {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc logsFolder=(self: var Logit; newLogsFolder: string) {.
    ...raises: [IOError, ValueError], tags: [ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
proc start(self: var Logit) {....raises: [IOError, ValueError],
                              tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Prepares Logit for logging using the given Logit instance. This function assumes that Logit has everything ready to start logging, that means you must have set the path property.

Templates

template debug(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template error(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template fatal(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template info(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template log(self: Logit; level: LogLevel; message: string; autoNewLine = true;
             someInfo = none(InstantiationInfo))
Logs a message with the specified log level. The message can be a string or any expression that evaluates to a string. The autoNewLine parameter determines whether to automatically add a newline after the message (default is true). 
template log(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template other(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template trace(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
template warn(self: Logit; message = ""; autoNewLine = true)
